characters.name: Abdul Hakim
characters.description: Abdul HakimEstimated Age28[1]Height6' 2" (reported by Big Shots)Weight233 lb (reported by Big Shots)IDD23578SSBStatusAliveVoice actorRyūzaburō Ōtomo(Japanese)Joe Romersa(English)ActorCali Nelle(Netflix Series)Jay Paulson(Netflix Series) Abdul Hakim(アブドゥル・ハキム,Abdul Hakim?)was a criminal and notorious serial pet thief who became abounty head. In 2071, Hakim stole a "data dog" namedEinfrom an illegal research facility intending to sell it to a buyer. This incurred abountyof 8 millionWoolongs. He then used a doctor to perform surgery on him to alter his appearance and, even his size; post-surgery, he appeared much bigger than the size thatBig Shotreported. Instead of paying the doctor, however, he beat him up and left.

characters.name: Abdul Hakim
characters.description: Abdul HakimEstimated Age28[1]Height6' 2" (reported by Big Shots)Weight233 lb (reported by Big Shots)IDD23578SSBStatusAliveVoice actorRyūzaburō Ōtomo(Japanese)Joe Romersa(English)ActorCali Nelle(Netflix Series)Jay Paulson(Netflix Series) Abdul Hakim(アブドゥル・ハキム,Abdul Hakim?)was a criminal and notorious serial pet thief who became abounty head. In 2071, Hakim stole a "data dog" namedEinfrom an illegal research facility intending to sell it to a buyer. This incurred abountyof 8 millionWoolongs. He then used a doctor to perform surgery on him to alter his appearance and, even his size; post-surgery, he appeared much bigger than the size thatBig Shotreported. Instead of paying the doctor, however, he beat him up and left.

characters.name: Abdul Hakim (Netflix)
characters.description: Abdul HakimHair ColourBlackGinger (Disguise)Criminal RecordsMurder, TheftSessions3, 8StatusDeceasedActorCali Nelle (Netflix Series)Jay Paulson (Netflix Series) Abdul Hakimis aBounty headin theCowboy Beboplive-action adaptation. Hakim in his undisguised form had black hair in an afro, dark skin, and brown eyes. In his disguised form, Hakim had long ginger hair with prominent sideburns, and blue eyes. He wore a brown leather jacket over a light tanned brown tunic, skinny blue jeans, and black boots. Despite being a wanted killer, Hakim was shown to have a masochistic side as he frequently saw a dominatrix by the name ofGreta. He also showed a sensitive and compassionate side, at first, he wanted to kill the dogs belonging to the rich people his family once worked for. However, upon realizing how they're innocent and how he grew to like them, he bonded with them.

characters.name: Achebe Laman
characters.description: Achebe Laman Achebe Lamanwas a criminal and abounty headin the organization ofPiccaro Calvino. When Calvino's group stoleGrey Ash, Laman had a 100,000Woolongbounty.Roco Bonnaro, another of the group, had stolen the plant for himself and Paolo went after him along withCarpi PaoloandBakri Chinva.[1]

characters.name: Ajiz
characters.description: Ajizwas a criminal and abounty head. The crew of theBebopwent after Ajiz onMars, but, unfortunately, were forced to let him escape. When the crew went toEarth,Edwardhacked the ship and learned about this, using it to demonstrate she knew everything about them.[1] Ajiz was only mentioned in dialog. The name spelling comes from English subtitles.

characters.name: Alfredo
characters.description: AlfredoAnimeLive-ActionStatusAliveVoice actorTsutomu Taruki(Japanese)Paul St. Peter(English)ActorIra Munn(Netflix Series) Alfredois an entertainer who playedPunchonBig Shot. Alfredo played Punch for many episodes in 2071 along with his partner Judy. Together, they reported on dozens ofbounty heads. His last show was reporting onDoctor Londes. He informed his audience (as well as Judy) during the broadcast.[1]

characters.name: Alisa (Netflix)
characters.description: AlisaHair ColourBlondeSessions3, 5, 7, 10StatusAliveActorSimone McAullay AlisaisJet Black'sex-lover and the mother of their childKimmie Blackin theCowboy Beboplive-action adaption. Alisa has blonde hair and blue eyes. In her first appearance, she wore a black tank top, some necklaces, plaid gray sweaters, and shoes. Alisa seems to hold some resentment toward Jet, but on very few occasions will allow Jet to visit Kimmie.

characters.name: Amjad
characters.description: AmjadStatusAliveVoice actorShinpachi Tsuji (Japanese)Brian George (English) DoctorAmjadwas an expert in the history of satellites surroundingEarth. When theEarth Police Departmentput out abountyon the hacker responsible for using satellites to make land carvings, the news had Amjad as a guest to explain the history of the satellites and why hackers would want to use them.[1]

characters.name: Anastasia (Netflix)
characters.description: AnastasiaHair ColourDark BrownSessions2-4, 7, 9-10StatusAliveActorTamara Tunie Anastasiais an old ally ofSpikein theCowboy Beboplive-actionadaptation. Ana has permed dark brown hair and hazel color eyes. She wears a black leather jacket over a brown dress shirt, black pants, and high-heel shoes. She uses an umbrella as a make-shift cane. Ana is a shrewd no non-sense lady who as stern as she can be, she shows the utmost compassion and loyalty toward those with whom she trusts and are close with her.

characters.name: Andy
characters.description: Andy Von De OniyateEstimated Age27Height6' 2" (188 cm)Weight174lbsHair ColourBlondeEye ColourGreenKnown AliasesCowboy Andy, Wyatt Earp, MusashiWeapon of ChoiceColt Single Action ArmyIDY99478LIDSessionsCowboy FunkStatusAliveVoice actorMasashi Ebara (Japanese)Daran Norris(English)  Andy Von De Oniyate(アンディ・フォン・デ・オニヤテ,Andi Fon De Oniyate?)was a rich, egocentricbounty hunterwith a cowboy gimmick. As such, he had interactions with theBebopcrew, particularlySpike Spiegel. Andy is a rich, incompetent, self-centered, stubborn and selfish bounty hunter. He later on develops a new code, following the code of a samurai and dons a new look.

characters.name: Animal Treasure owner
characters.description: Animal Treasure ownerEstimated Age43[1]StatusAliveVoice actorRin Mizuhara (Japanese)Barbara Goodson (English) TheAnimal Treasure ownerwas the owner ofAnimal TreasureonMars. The owner was approached by a man trying to sell aPembroke Welsh Corgi,Ein. Unbeknownst to her, the man was a thief who had stolen it fromAbdul Hakim. BothSpike Spiegeland Hakim came pointing guns at the man, which frightened her. Spike forced her to open the briefcase, revealing Ein. After she told them that he wasn't worth much, Spike left. Hakim, however, tried to take Ein and, in the process, accidentally fired his gun, scaring all the animals. The owner had to gather them all again.[2]

characters.name: Appledelhi Siniz Hesap Lütfen
characters.description: Appledelhi Siniz Hesap LütfenEstimated Age42Height6' 8"Weight466 lbsHair ColourBrownEye ColourGreenPlanet of OriginEarthIDL12345ABCCriminal RecordsBank Robbery, Manslaughter (forged byEdward)Voice actorKenji Utsumi (Japanese)Barry Stigler (English)  Siniz Hesap Lütfen Appledelhi(アップルデリー・シニズ・ヘサップ・リュトフェン,Siniz Hesap Lütfen Appledelhi?)was a cartographer onEarth. He is the father ofEdward, though was not around for much of her life. Much like his daughter, Appledelhi is very fixated on his passion and his mind does appear to operate on a different plane than most people. He is very energetic and cheerful, but also oftentimes emotionally detached from the situation and people that surround him. Notable examples are his assistant, whose name Appledelhi cannot remember after being corrected multiple times, and Edward whom he left in a daycare and only came looking for her much later. When father and daughter are reunited, Appledelhi doesn't remember whether Edward is a boy or girl and briefly asks her if she wants to join him, only to head off as soon as another meteor crashes in the distance.

characters.name: Bacchus
characters.description: BacchusStatusUnknownVoice actorKosei Tomita (Japanese)Peter Spellos (English) Bacchuswas a doctor and con man. He is the uncle ofWhitney Haggis. In 2068, he started a plan along withManleyto take advantage ofFaye Valentine, a cryogenically-frozen woman whose records were lost. He gave her the name "Valentine" and woke her up. He faked a set of debts for her to have incurred, planning to convince her work for him. Additionally, he had Haggis pretend to be a lawyer to help create a con in which Faye would accept his debts. The plan was successful.

characters.name: Baker Panchorero
characters.description: Baker PanchoreroEstimated Age36Height6'1"Weight263 lbs.Eye ColourBlackDomicileMarsIDG54960EGICriminal RecordsBank robberySessionsGanymede ElegyStatusAliveVoice actorKatsutoshi Houki (Japanese)Doug Stone (English) Baker Panchorerowas a criminal and a bank robber. characters.description: Bitch CassidySessions5StatusAlive Bitch Cassidyis aBounty hunterin theCowboy Bebop (Netflix)adaptation. Bitch Cassidy was featured on theBig Shotshow as one of the big-nameBounty huntersafter the recently escaped prisoners onEuropa.[1]
